active_model.notes: No active model yet; promoting t20_logistic_pretoss_calibrated_v1 (test_brier=0.2032).

notes: Uses only model_predictions joined to historical market_baselines for candidate selection.
A candidate is eligible only when the market baseline timestamp is on or before the simulated match date.
CLV uses the latest stored market baseline for the same match/market/selection as an evaluation-only closing proxy.
Synthetic market-implied baselines and app fixture odds are excluded from strategy candidate selection.
This is paper research only; no real-money execution is represented.
latest_backtest.sample_warning: No historical candidates with timestamp-valid real market baselines.

items.detail: The app exposes only a paper broker and has no live-money execution path.
items.label: Real-money connector disabled

items.detail: Paper account exists and bankroll/exposure can be audited.
items.label: Paper broker state

items.detail: ODDS_API_KEY is loaded from environment/.env; the key itself is never displayed.
items.label: Bet365 odds feed configured

items.detail: At least one Bet365 market snapshot has been stored.
items.label: Real bookmaker odds captured

items.detail: Risk decisions explicitly block missing or stale Bet365 odds.
items.label: Fresh-odds betting gate

items.detail: Cricsheet matches and chronological Elo rows must exist before supervised evaluation can be reproduced.
items.label: Model training data

items.detail: At least one model run should be stored with Brier score, log loss, accuracy, and payload metrics.
items.label: Model evaluation runs

items.detail: Historical predictions are needed for calibration review and strategy backtests.
items.label: Historical model predictions

items.detail: One active model should be selected for paper execution.
items.label: Active model registry

items.detail: Run the market data build/backtest after historical market odds exist.
items.label: Historical strategy backtesting

items.detail: A research-grade read needs at least 30 bets from timestamp-valid real market baselines.
items.label: Backtest sample size

items.detail: Paper bet evaluations compare entry odds against the latest closing proxy.
items.label: Paper CLV tracking

items.detail: Pipeline decisions are persisted with reasons and payloads.
items.label: Decision audit trail

items.detail: Background scheduler ticks monitor/settle continuously and retrains on a schedule, without manual button presses.
items.label: Background scheduler heartbeat

items.detail: Pytest coverage exists for odds parsing, risk gates, workflows, server routes, and backtesting.
items.label: Regression tests
